MATTER ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, JULY 1, 2010. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. PLAINTIFF DENIS RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR DOCUMENT PRODUCTION, FOR AN ORDER THAT ALL OBJECTIONS ARE DEEMED WAIVED, AND FOR ORDER DEEMING ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ADMITTED IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $890, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT HEWLETT JR., NOT REPORTED (612).

MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) and failure to appear at Early Settlement Conference is heard this day. No appearance. Defendant's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF DENIS RODRIGUEZ' Motion For Issue, Evidence Or Terminating Sanctions transferred to Dept. 612. Parties to contact clerk in that department to schedule a hearing date. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Not reported =301/PJB

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2010 Set For Trial On Jan-18-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-29-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 602

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Document Production; For An Order That All Objections Are Deemed Waived
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Matter on calendar for Thursday, July 1, 2010. No appearance by either party.
PLAINTIFF DENIS RODRIGUEZ's Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories, And Request For Document Production, For An Order That All Objections Are Deemed Waived, And For Order Deeming All Requests For Admission Admitted is granted. No opposition filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to form and special interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's Requests For Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $890, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr., not reported (612).
